snippet.title: Chunnari Chunnari - Let’s Go | Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai |Varun,Mrunal,Pooja| In Cinemas 5th June
snippet.description:
🔥 Get ready to groove to the ultimate dance song of the year — Chunnari Chunnari - Let’s Go! 💃✨
From the much-awaited Bollywood entertainer Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai, this electrifying track brings back the iconic 90s vibe with a fresh party twist! 🎶❤️

With peppy beats, colorful energy, and vocals that will make you hit repeat, this song is all set to rule your playlists and dance floors! 🕺🔥

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
Releasing In Cinemas Worldwide on 5th June 2026

Song Credits : 
Song Title: Chunnari Chunnari - Let’s Go!
Music Composer: Akshay & IP
Additional Lyrics: IP Singh
Singers: IP Singh, Jonita Gandhi, Asees Kaur, Sudhir Yaduvanshi, Anuradha Sriram
Music Produced & Arranged: Akshay Raheja, Abhishek Singh
Guitars: Chaitanya Bhaidkar
Mix & Master: Abhishek Ghatak
Original Music: Anu Malik
Original Lyrics: Sameer Anjaan
Director Of Choreography: Remo D'souza

Movie Details: 
Tips Films Ltd Presents
Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
Directed By David Dhawan
Produced By Ramesh Taurani
Cast: Varun Dhawan, Mrunal Thakur, Pooja Hegde, Maniesh Paul, Chunky Pandey, Jimmy Shergill, Mouni Roy
Co-Producer: Gaurav Bose (Maximilian Films UK)
DOP: Ayananka Bose
Story & Screenplay Writer: Yunus Sajawal
Dialogue Writer: Farhad Samji
Music: White Noise Collectives, Tanishk Bagchi, Rony Ajnali, Gill Macchrai (Classy Beats), Javed - Mohsin, Akshay & IP
Lyrics: Vayu, Jairaj, Mohsin Shaikh, Rony Ajnali & Gill Macchrai (Classy Beats), IP Singh
Director Of Choreography: Remo D'souza, Bosco Martis, Vijay Ganguly
Editor: Ritesh Soni
Head Of Production: Varsha Taurani
Production Designer: Late Rajat Poddar & Parijat Poddar
Action Director: Sunil Rodrigues

Sound Recording & Sound Design:  Parikshit Lavani & Kunal Mehhta (CSD Studio)
Background Score Raju Singh
Costume Designer Aki Narula, Samidha Wangnoo
Associate Producer Prakash Talreja
Executive Producer Sushil Tirwadkar
Line Producer Sudipto (Sid) Sarkar (UK)
Associate Director Aakar Kauoshik
Associate Editor: Sanket Rajadhyaksha
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (Cas)
Casting Director Mukesh Chhabra (Csa) & Rachita Kapoor (UK)
Di Studio : Redefine
Di Colourist Ashirwad Hadkar (Isc)
Vfx Do It Creative Ltd (UK)
Post Producer Murli Shah
Publicity Design: Parass Kanani (  House Of AWE)
Media Consultant : Nilufer Qureshi (Hype)

Marketing Consultant:  Yash Suchak & Suraj Rao (Grey Alchemy)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
Visual Promotions Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)
UK Production Maximilian Films Ltd. 

Lyrics : 
Chunari-Chunari
 
Saari Raen Din
Saara Chaen Mera
Hosh Tabiyat Lutt Ke Lae Gayi,
 
Udti Jaaye Banke Patang,
Kar Mujhko Tang Ye Kya Hai Keh Gayi,
 
Lehraaye Besharmi Se
Tadpaaye Berehmi Se
Chhoo Loon Tu Kehde Jo Zaraa.
 
Aaja Na Chhoo Le Meri Chunari Sanam
Kuchh Na Main Bolun Tujhey Meri Qasam.
 
Aaya Deewaana Darr Pe Tere
Tere Bin Kya Karoon Bataa De Bereham.
 
Mhare Dil Mein Bajee Pichkari,
Rangi Main Poori Thaari Sajna,
Teri Choonar Manay Samjhaa Ri,
Ke Ho Gi Tu Hai Mhaari Sajnaa.

snippet.title: GOVERNOR | Official Trailer | Manoj Bajpayee | Vipul Amrutlal Shah |Chinmay Mandlekar |Aashin A Shah
snippet.description:
“If I fail... India fails.”

Manoj Bajpayee brings to life the untold story of the brave unsung hero who saved India from bankruptcy.

Witness GOVERNOR.
Trailer Out Now.
In cinemas on 12th June, 2026.

Starring: Manoj Bajpayee, Adah Sharma, Noushad Mohamed Kunju

Production company :
Sunshine Pictures

Directed by: Chinmay D Mandlekar

snippet.title: Ghis Ghis Ghis | Welcome to the Jungle | Akshay Kumar, Akshara Singh | Vikram Montrose | 26th June
snippet.description:
Presenting the ultimate collaboration of the year, Bollywood Khiladi Akshay Kumar teams up with the undisputed queen of Bhojpuri cinema, Akshara Singh. 🔥🎶 Ghis Ghis Ghis from 'Welcome to the Jungle' sung by Vikram Montrose and Supriya Pathak, with catchy lyrics by Abhinav Shekhar, is not just a song; it’s a high-octane Bollywood-Bhojpuri celebration packed with desi swag, electrifying energy, and nonstop entertainment.

#GhisGhisGhis #AkshayKumar #AksharaSingh #WelcomeToTheJungle #BollywoodSong #BollywoodDanceSong #BhojpuriSong #BhojpuriDanceSong #PartySong #DanceSong #BollywoodNewSong

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Suniel Shetty, Disha Patani, Jacqueline Fernandez, Arshad Warsi, Jackie Shroff, Paresh Rawal, Raveena Tandon, Lara Dutta, Farida Jalal, Johny Lever, Shreyas Talpade, Tusshar Kapoor, Rajpal Yadav, Krushna Abhishek, Kiku Sharda, Daler Mehndi, Aftab Shivdasani, Mukesh Tiwari, Yashpal Sharma, Kiran Kumar, Zakir Hussain, Vindu Dara Singh, Urvashi Rautela, Hemant Pandey, Brijendra Kala, Feroze Khan(Arjun), Late Pankaj Dheer ji, Puneet Issar, Sudesh Berry, Jeetu Verma, Vrihi Kodvara, Adityaa Singgh, Bhagya Bhanushali 

A.A. Nadiadwala, Cape of Good Films & Star Studio18 present 
In association with Seeta Films & Rakesh Dang 
A Base Industries Group Production 
Produced by Firoz  A.  Nadiadwallah, Rakesh Dang & Vedant Vikaas Baali
Director: Ahmed Khan
DOP: Kabir Lal 
Story: Late Neeraj Vora Ji 
Dialogue: Farhad Samji 
Editor: Nitin FCP

Ghis Ghis Ghis

Hook Idea: Ishteyak Mustak

Music Supervisor: Meggha Bali

Assistant Mix Engineer: Michael Edwin Pillai @FSOB
Music Co-ordinator: Shubbham Verma
Music Assistant: Akash Yadav
Legal: Roshni Lachhwani
Vocals Recorded at Vikram Montrose Studio

Choreographer: Ganesh Acharya

Executive Producer: Aniket Rao
Second Unit Director: Adnan A. Shaikh
Associate Director: Shukti Sharma
First Assistant Director: Aniket Rao
Script & Continuity Supervisor and Director’s Assistant: Diisha Danait

Background Music Sfx: Prince

CA: Abhiraj Ranawat

DI Colourist: Nirmal Sharma

Stream on:
Insta - https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/1905076706876828
Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/01gOiykaP47YbIuAjhwV4w
Amazon Music - https://music.amazon.in/tracks/B0H2J9T5DH
Apple Music - https://music.apple.com/in/album/ghis-ghis-ghis-from-welcome-to-the-jungle-single/6771748190
Gaana - https://gaana.com/song/ghis-ghis-ghis-from-welcome-to-the-jungle
JioSaavn - https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/ghis-ghis-ghis-from-welcome-to-the-jungle/BlEvcx8CDwc
YouTube Music - https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=JvQbncRdY94&si=cAoS4YtMQN29Fy0X

Lyrics:
Ghis ghis ghis ghis ghis 
Ghis ghis ghis
Ghis ghis ghis ghis ghis 
Ghis ghis ghis
Ae Raja sabun se
Ae Raja
Ae Raja

Bahiya mein bharke peesela chakki
Honthva pe kaate jaise madhumakkhi
Tani paas aava naughty girl
Bahiya mein bharke peeseni chakki
Honthva pe kaatab jaise madhumakkhi

Meetha khilayi ke
Aadat lagayi ke
Bhag na jahiyan raja ji

Hamar laagal ba dilva
Arre laga ba kaare gori

Hamar laagal ba dilva playboy se
Ragad ke nehela deb sabun se
Tohar lagal ba dilva playboy se
Ragad ke nehela de tu sabun se

Arre poora chamka debe kaare

Re pithiya dabaye rani chadh chadh ke
Re pithiya dabaye rani chadh chadh ke
Mathva pe hathva se ghis ke sabuniya
Ragde jawaani pura bhar bhar ke

Ghis ghis ghis ghis ghis 
Ghis ghis ghis arre ghisa rani

Re pithiya dabaye rani chadh chadh ke
Re pithiya dabaye rani chadh chadh ke
Kohni gadaye jab bada maza aaye
Chalke jawani pura bhar bhar ke

Meetha khilayi ke
Aadat lagayi ke
Bhag na jahiyan raja ji

Hamar laagal ba dilva
Arre laga ba kaare gori

Hamar laagal ba dilva playboy se
Ragad ke nehela deb sabun se
Tohar lagal ba dilva playboy se
Ragad ke nehela de tu sabun se
Arre poora chamka debe kaa re

snippet.title: HAMDAM (Official Music Video) - Hesham Abdul Wahab, Hanan Shaah, Shafi Kollam, HarisSaleem, Zakariya
snippet.description:
“Between prayers and memories, there lives a Hamdam”.

Celebrate this Bakrid with "HAMDAM," a grand audio-visual anthem from Aachus Production that beautifully bridges traditional festive warmth with modern global sounds to deliver a powerful message of peace, love, and togetherness.

Composed and performed by Hesham Abdul Wahab, the track features the soulful vocals of Hanan Shaah, moving Malayalam lyrics by Shafi Kollam, and an energetic English rap verse by veteran artist Haris Saleem (Street Academics). Bringing this melody to life on screen is award-winning filmmaker Zakariya in his music video directorial debut, transforming "HAMDAM" into a stunning, cinematic celebration of community.

Listen to HAMDAM: https://tuneabl.com/stream-hamdam

Music Credits:
Song Composed, Arranged and produced by Hesham Abdul wahab 
Singers: Hesham Abdul Wahab, Hanan Shaah, Shafi Kollam
Rap performed and written by Haris Saleem (Street Academics) 
Additional Vocals: Ayshath Safa and Vichuuuh

en.title: HAMDAM (Official Music Video) - Hesham Abdul Wahab, Hanan Shaah, Shafi Kollam, HarisSaleem, Zakariya
en.description:
“Between prayers and memories, there lives a Hamdam”.

Celebrate this Bakrid with "HAMDAM," a grand audio-visual anthem from Aachus Production that beautifully bridges traditional festive warmth with modern global sounds to deliver a powerful message of peace, love, and togetherness.

Composed and performed by Hesham Abdul Wahab, the track features the soulful vocals of Hanan Shaah, moving Malayalam lyrics by Shafi Kollam, and an energetic English rap verse by veteran artist Haris Saleem (Street Academics). Bringing this melody to life on screen is award-winning filmmaker Zakariya in his music video directorial debut, transforming "HAMDAM" into a stunning, cinematic celebration of community.

Listen to HAMDAM: https://tuneabl.com/stream-hamdam

Music Credits:
Song Composed, Arranged and produced by Hesham Abdul wahab 
Singers: Hesham Abdul Wahab, Hanan Shaah, Shafi Kollam

snippet.title: Mango Pachcha - Official Trailer | Sanchith | Viveka | KRG Studios | Supriyanvi
snippet.description:
For more latest songs & videos, subscribe 👉 https://bit.ly/Saregama_Kannada

From the streets of Mysore to the shadows behind power,
a story filled with emotions, chaos, family, politics & rebellion is ready to unfold🔥

Supriyanvi Picture Studios and KRG Studios proudly present the official trailer of Mango Pachcha
Introducing Sanchit Sanjeev — a fresh talent stepping into cinema with fire, intensity and honesty filled with emotion, rage, innocence and madness — making a striking debut on the big screen.

“People with power win wars.
People with willpower build empires.”

Mysuru 2001-02: Mango Pachcha chronicles the saga of loyalty, deceit and power spanning over a decade on a local empire.

Movie Credits:
Producers: Priya Sudeep, Karthik & Yogi G Raj
Director: Viveka
Written by: Viveka, Nagbhushan Deshpande
Cast: Sanchith Sanjeev, Kajal Kunder, Prashanth Hiremath, Mayur Patel, Jai , Harini Shreekanth, Hamsa Narayanaswamy, Ugramm Manju

snippet.title: REAL STRUGGLE (Official Music Video) | Dharampreet & Kuldeep Rasila | New Punjabi Song 2026
snippet.description:
LUCKY MANILA & KULDEEP RASILA PRESENTS

🎬 REAL STRUGGLE – Official Music Video


Life is not always easy. Behind every smile, every dream, and every success, there is a story of sacrifice, pain, hard work, and struggle. “REAL STRUGGLE” is a Punjabi track dedicated to those people who keep fighting their battles silently and never give up.
This song reflects the reality of life, emotions, and the journey that many people experience while chasing their dreams. If you have ever faced difficult times, this song is for you.


✨ Watch the full video and feel the emotion behind every word.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

💫 Song Credits:
🎤 Singer: Dharampreet & Kuldeep Rasila
🎼 Music: Still Music
✍️ Lyrics: Kaka Mallwal
🎬 Director: Mehraaj Singh
✂️ Editor: Jeet Rowdy
🎥 Presentation: Lucky Manila & Kuldeep Rasila

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

💥 Every struggle creates a stronger person.
💥 Every pain has a story.
💥 Every dream needs sacrifice.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

REAL STRUGGLE – A song from the heart ❤️
If you enjoyed this song then don’t forget to:

আমাকে অনুসরণ করুন 
· ইনস্টাগ্রাম - https://www.instagram.com/comicverseyt/
· এক্স - https://x.com/comicverseyt

দাবিত্যাগ: - এই চ্যানেল কোনো অবৈধ কার্যকলাপকে প্রচার বা উৎসাহিত করে না। এই চ্যানেলের সমস্ত বিষয়বস্তু শুধুমাত্র শিক্ষামূলক এবং তথ্যমূলক উদ্দেশ্যে তৈরি। 

কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ: - কপিরাইট আইন ১৯৭৬-এর ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের (FAIR USE) অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে। ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত একটি ব্যবহার, যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে। অলাভজনক, শিক্ষামূলক বা ব্যক্তিগত ব্যবহার ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের পক্ষে ভারসাম্য রক্ষা করে।

চ্যানেল ডিসক্লেইমার – কমিকভার্স হলো একটি পপ কালচার কমেন্টারি ও ফিল্ম রিভিউ চ্যানেল, যা ফ্যান থিওরি, ফিল্ম, ওয়েব সিরিজ এবং ট্রেলার রিভিউয়ের জন্য উৎসর্গীকৃত। কমিকভার্স চ্যানেল মাঝে মাঝে ফিল্ম, ওয়েব সিরিজ, ট্রেলার এবং গান সম্পর্কে ব্যাখ্যা করার জন্য ফিল্ম ক্লিপ, টিভি সিরিজ ক্লিপ, ওয়েব সিরিজ ক্লিপ, অ্যানিমেশন সিরিজ ক্লিপ ব্যবহার করে থাকে, কিন্তু কপিরাইট আইন ১৯৭৬-এর ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের (ফেয়ার ইউজ) অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়।

➟Recording Engineers at Arijit Singh’s Studio - Ritvik Shah, Sukanto Singha

Musicians :-
➟Live Acoustic Guitar : Arijit Singh, John Paul, Saswata Das
➟Live Electric Guitar & Bass : John Paul

Dinesh Vijan & Luv Ranjan presents #Cocktail2​, releasing in cinemas on 19th June, 2026

A Maddock Films & Luv Films Production

🎬 Video Credits

➟ Cast: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna 
➟ Directed By: Homi Adajania 
➟ Produced By: Dinesh Vijan, Luv Ranjan and Ankur Garg
➟ Written By: Tarun Jain and Luv Ranjan
➟ Co-Producers: Sharada Karki Jalota, Pooja Prem Patheja

➟ Director of Photography: Santhana Krishnan Ravichandran
➟ Original Song and Background Score: Pritam Chakraborty   
➟ Costume Designer: Anaita Shroff Adajania 
➟ Director of Choreography: Vijay A. Ganguly
➟ Publicity Design: Himanshu  & Rahul Nanda (H-one)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Lyrics:

Jeene ki hai tu hi vajah
Jeena tere liye
Main kya kahun ke yaar tu
Hai Kya Mere Liye

Zamane me kahin
Meri tarah kabhi
Chahega na koi
Tujhko

Jaise maine diya
Vaise poori tarah
Dil dega na koi
Tujhko

Tujhko..
Jab Se Mila..
Tujhko..

Tujhko..
Maana Jahan..
Tujhko..

Subah ki saari furtiyan
Bekhudi har shaam ki
Na ho tere saath mein
Toh meri kis kaam ki

Uthe jo mera har qadam
Tere sang shuruat me
Haath daale Haath me
Fiqr kya anjaam ki

Mujh mein zyaada ab tu hi hai
Jitna main hoon voh kyun hi hai
Kuch aisa kar main dhoondhoon bhi toh
Paun na khudh ko..

Tu hi toh aasman
Tu hi meri zameen 
Maana hai Zindagi
Tujhko..

Bin maange har dua
Poori hui meri
Paaya jo humnasheen
Tujhko..

Tujhko..
Jab se mila..
Tujhko..

Tujhko..
Maana jahan..
Tujhko..

Tujhko..

Galatiyan bhi teri
Main gawara karun
Ye khata hi sahi, par dobara karun

Kya karun sarphira
Ishq hi hai mera
Izhaar ka yahi tareeqa hai mera..

Aankhon ki hai tu raushni
Tu hi toh khaab hai
Main hoon agar savaal toh
Tu hi jawaab hai..


© 2026 Universal Music India Pvt. Ltd., Under Exclusive License from Mad for Mussic

snippet.title: Made in India: A Titan Story - Official Trailer | Naseeruddin Shah, Jim Sarbh | Amazon MX Player
snippet.description:
Amazon MX Player presents 
Made In India: A Titan Story - Official Trailer 

Starring: Jim Sarbh, Naseeruddin Shah, Vaibhav Tatwawadi, Namita Dubey, Kaveri Seth, Lakshvir Saran
Production House: Almighty Motion Picture & T-Series Films
Produced By: Prabhleen Sandhu, Bhushan Kumar, Kishan Kumar
Written By: Karan Vyas
Directed By: Robbie Grewal
Genre: Biography

About Made In India: A Titan Story - 
Set in Pre-liberalised India, TITAN is “India’s First Start-up story” where India was at the cusp of an economic & social change. The show follows the journey of Xerxes Desai, who was tasked with reviving Tata Press but he ends up transforming the failing venture by pivoting to a totally new category, watches. Facing bureaucratic hurdles, market challenges, and personal sacrifices, Xerxes’ relentless pursuit of excellence and innovation culminates in the birth of iconic brands like Sonata and the revolutionary Titan Edge, eventually leading to his name becoming the gold standard of Indian ingenuity & resilience. 

About Amazon MX Player -
Amazon MX Player is India’s leading free, premium, ad-supported streaming entertainment platform, offering a massive library of trending web series, reality shows, movies, and international content — all FREE to watch. From youth hits and binge-worthy dramas to reality competition shows, Amazon MX Player is home to some of India’s most popular titles including Hip Hop India, Case Toh Banta Hai, Playground, Battleground, Crushed, Gutar Gu, Rise and Fall, Sisterhood, Campus Beats, First Copy, Pyar Ka Professor, Jamnapaar, I-Popstar, Aukaat Ke Bahar and many more. Love international content? Explore MX Vdesi, featuring top global shows dubbed in Hindi, Tamil, and Telugu—including fan-favourites like Our Secret, Gen Z, Time To Fall In Love, W: Two Worlds Apart, My Deskmate, and more! With new shows dropping regularly across genres like romance, action, comedy, crime, thriller, K-drama, youth drama, and reality entertainment — there’s always something exciting to stream.

en-IN.title: Made in India: A Titan Story - Official Trailer | Naseeruddin Shah, Jim Sarbh | Amazon MX Player
en-IN.description:
Amazon MX Player presents 
Made In India: A Titan Story - Official Trailer 

Starring: Jim Sarbh, Naseeruddin Shah, Vaibhav Tatwawadi, Namita Dubey, Kaveri Seth, Lakshvir Saran
Production House: Almighty Motion Picture & T-Series Films
Produced By: Prabhleen Sandhu, Bhushan Kumar, Kishan Kumar
Written By: Karan Vyas
Directed By: Robbie Grewal
Genre: Biography

About Made In India: A Titan Story - 
Set in Pre-liberalised India, TITAN is “India’s First Start-up story” where India was at the cusp of an economic & social change. The show follows the journey of Xerxes Desai, who was tasked with reviving Tata Press but he ends up transforming the failing venture by pivoting to a totally new category, watches. Facing bureaucratic hurdles, market challenges, and personal sacrifices, Xerxes’ relentless pursuit of excellence and innovation culminates in the birth of iconic brands like Sonata and the revolutionary Titan Edge, eventually leading to his name becoming the gold standard of Indian ingenuity & resilience. 

About Amazon MX Player -
Amazon MX Player is India’s leading free, premium, ad-supported streaming entertainment platform, offering a massive library of trending web series, reality shows, movies, and international content — all FREE to watch. From youth hits and binge-worthy dramas to reality competition shows, Amazon MX Player is home to some of India’s most popular titles including Hip Hop India, Case Toh Banta Hai, Playground, Battleground, Crushed, Gutar Gu, Rise and Fall, Sisterhood, Campus Beats, First Copy, Pyar Ka Professor, Jamnapaar, I-Popstar, Aukaat Ke Bahar and many more. Love international content? Explore MX Vdesi, featuring top global shows dubbed in Hindi, Tamil, and Telugu—including fan-favourites like Our Secret, Gen Z, Time To Fall In Love, W: Two Worlds Apart, My Deskmate, and more! With new shows dropping regularly across genres like romance, action, comedy, crime, thriller, K-drama, youth drama, and reality entertainment — there’s always something exciting to stream.

snippet.title: एकादशी भजन - ग्यारस उसी के घर में जावेगी, जहां लगा पेड़ तुलसी का | Ekadashi Bhajan | Gyaras Bhajan
snippet.description:
🌿✨ग्यारस उसी के घर में जावेगी, जहां लगा पेड़ तुलसी का | Ekadashi Bhajan | FINE DIGITAL HARYANVI✨🌿
(Gyaras Usi Ke Ghar Mein Javegi Jaha Laga Ped Tulsi Ka

🙏 प्रस्तुत है एक बेहद मधुर और भक्तिमय एकादशी भजन — “जहां लगा पेड़ तुलसी का”, जिसमें बताया गया है कि जहाँ तुलसी का पौधा होता है, वहाँ स्वयं लक्ष्मी जी, भगवान विष्णु और सभी देवी-देवताओं की कृपा बनी रहती है। यह भजन भक्ति, श्रद्धा और आध्यात्मिक शांति से भरपूर है।

Song Info :-
■ Title ▹Gyaras Usi Ke Ghar Me Javegi Jaha Laga Ped Tulsi Ka
■ Artist ▹ Ritu
■ Singer ▹ Kiran Negi
■ Music ▹ Kuldeep Mali Aala
■ Keyboard Player ▹ Sachin Kamal 
■ Lyrics & Composition ▹Traditional
■ Song Production Support ▹Rajesh Madina
■ Editing ▹Max Ranga
■ Cameraman ▹Gulshan Bawa
■ Label ▹Fine Digital Video
■ Copyright ▹Fine Digital Media

Special Thanks To All Team

🎶 इस भजन में आपको मिलेगा:
✨ तुलसी माता का महत्व
✨ एकादशी व्रत की महिमा
✨ भगवान विष्णु और लक्ष्मी जी की कृपा
✨ भक्ति रस में डूबा हुआ सुंदर कीर्तन

💚 अगर आपको यह भजन पसंद आए तो LIKE 👍 जरूर करें,
💬 COMMENT करके बताएं आपको कैसा लगा,
🔔 और चैनल FINE DIGITAL HARYANVI को SUBSCRIBE करना न भूलें नीचे दिए हुए लिंक पे
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UClwM5RNjqRRnAf1CGBEe_8g?sub_confirmation=1

📌 हर एकादशी पर ऐसे ही भक्ति भजन सुनने के लिए जुड़े रहें हमारे साथ।

🔔 जय श्री हरि 🙏 जय तुलसी माता 🌿

#EkadashiBhajan #TulsiBhajan #VishnuBhajan #LaxmiMataBhajan #BhaktiSong #Kirtan #HindiBhajan #FineDigital #DevotionalSong

snippet.title: श्री राम की गली में तुम जाना | Shri Ram Ki Gali Mein Tum Jana | Nachte Milenge Hanumana
snippet.description:
Shri Ram Ki Gali Mein Tum Jana Wahan Nachte Milenge Hanumana | Hanuman Bhajan for Energy, Bhakti & Positivity | Sanatan Music

“Shri Ram Ki Gali Mein Tum Jana Wahan Nachte Milenge Hanumana” is a joyful and powerful Hanuman bhajan filled with Ram bhakti, celebration, and devotional energy. This song beautifully shows the deep love of Hanuman ji for Shri Ram — where the name of Ram is sung, Hanuman is always present with devotion, strength, and divine joy.

This Hanuman bhajan is perfect for morning devotion, Tuesday/Saturday puja, Ram bhakti gatherings, satsang, festive playlists, workout motivation, or anytime you want to fill your space with high-energy bhakti.

✨ Why listen to this Hanuman bhajan:
• Brings energetic Ram bhakti and powerful devotional vibes
• Perfect for Tuesday/Saturday puja, satsang, and daily devotion
• Helps build courage, positivity, and inner strength
• Creates an uplifting atmosphere filled with Hanuman ji’s protection and grace

🎧 Play it loud, chant along, and feel the energy — wherever Shri Ram’s name is remembered, Hanuman ji’s devotion comes alive.
🙏 If this bhajan filled your heart with bhakti, please like, share, and subscribe to Sanatan Music for more Hanuman bhajans, Ram bhajans, and devotional songs.

🔐 Copyright Notice
© Sanatan Music. All rights reserved.
This is an original devotional composition produced and licensed by Sanatan Music. Unauthorized re-upload or use is strictly prohibited.

“Shri Ram Ki Gali Mein Tum Jana Wahan Nachte Milenge Hanumana” is a joyful and powerful Hanuman bhajan filled with Ram bhakti, celebration, and devotional energy. This song beautifully shows the deep love of Hanuman ji for Shri Ram — where the name of Ram is sung, Hanuman is always present with devotion, strength, and divine joy.

This Hanuman bhajan is perfect for morning devotion, Tuesday/Saturday puja, Ram bhakti gatherings, satsang, festive playlists, workout motivation, or anytime you want to fill your space with high-energy bhakti.

✨ Why listen to this Hanuman bhajan:
• Brings energetic Ram bhakti and powerful devotional vibes
• Perfect for Tuesday/Saturday puja, satsang, and daily devotion
• Helps build courage, positivity, and inner strength
• Creates an uplifting atmosphere filled with Hanuman ji’s protection and grace

🎧 Play it loud, chant along, and feel the energy — wherever Shri Ram’s name is remembered, Hanuman ji’s devotion comes alive.
🙏 If this bhajan filled your heart with bhakti, please like, share, and subscribe to Sanatan Music for more Hanuman bhajans, Ram bhajans, and devotional songs.

snippet.title: Tu Bewafa Hai – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Tu Bewafa Hai – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---


Tu bewafa hai…
ye baat ab
dil ko samajh aa gayi.

Jise humne
apni duniya maana…
usi ne
hume tanha chhod diya.

Mohabbat sachchi thi meri…
par tera saath
sirf ek jhootha ehsaas nikla.

“Tu Bewafa Hai”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo pyaar mein
toot kar bhi
sirf wafa karta raha.

Is gaane mein
dard bhi hai,
bewafai bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai —

humne dil diya tha…
tumne dard de diya…

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi se
beinteha mohabbat ki ho
aur badle mein bewafai mili ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

🎙️ Voice: Aarzoo Khaan
🎧 Vibe: Emotional • Deep • Heartbreak • Soulful (Arijit Singh Vibe)

snippet.title: Shakira, Burna Boy - Dai Dai (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Shakira, Burna Boy - Dai Dai (Official Video)
FIFA World Cup Official Song 2026

Music: https://songwhip.com/shakira/dai-dai

Letra/Lyrics: 
Oe oe e oe Oe oe e oe
You knew from the day you were born
That here in this place you belong
You been this brave all along
What broke you once made you strong

Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go
Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go!
Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go
Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go!

Come follow your desire
Theres a will there way
You are the owner of that fire
No one can take it away
Sweat and blood to write your story
That is how you paved the way
You are about to reach the glory
Only one step away

All the highs and lows
All the tears and the pain
You been there thru it all
Been thru it all
Just do it again
Now you got to believe (I believe)
Cuz you know what it takes
To be living the dream
At top of your game.

Feel it, got everything you needed
now bring it like you mean it
just like you mean it
Dale, no olvides lo que vales
Juega como tu sabes
Como tu sabes.

Energy is contagious you know
And it never fails no no
No one’s getting tired I know
Cuz you got that fire eio
Dream a little higher
Lets go lets go lets go
We’ve taken all that our hearts can hold
We can’t hold on to the past no more
From the dirt and the tears you make gold
You are more than flesh and bone

All the highs and lows
All the tears and the pain
You been there thru it all
Been thru it all
Just do it again
Now you got to believe ( I believe)
Cus you know what it takes
To be living the dream
At top of your game

Feel it, got everything you needed
Now bring it like you mean it
Just like you mean it
Dale no olvides lo que vales
juega como tu sabes
como tu sabes

Maldini
Romario
Cristiano
Ronaldo

Iniesta

You knew from the day you were born
That here in this place you belong
You been this brave all along
What broke you once made you strong
Dai dai iko

Dai dai iko

snippet.title: एकादशी के दिन हर घर में सुनी जाती हैं यह चमत्कारी पद्मिनी एकादशी अमृतवाणी | Padmini #Ekadashi 2026
snippet.description:
एकादशी के दिन हर घर में सुनी जाती हैं यह चमत्कारी पद्मिनी एकादशी अमृतवाणी | Padmini #Ekadashi 2026
*****************************************************************************************************
Song Credits:
Song : Padmini Ekadashi Amritwani
Singer : Kumar VIshu
Music : Diginor Stuio ( Arun Mishra )
Lyrics : Raj Anari
Label : Aaj Ki Amritwani
****************************************************************************************************
अधिक मास के शुक्ल पक्ष में आने वाली पावन पद्मिनी एकादशी भगवान Vishnu श्री हरि विष्णु को समर्पित होती है। यह एकादशी सभी एकादशियों में अत्यंत पुण्यदायी और दुर्लभ मानी जाती है। पद्मिनी एकादशी अमृतवाणी का श्रद्धापूर्वक श्रवण करने से भगवान विष्णु की कृपा, आध्यात्मिक उन्नति, पुण्य फल और जीवन में सकारात्मक ऊर्जा प्राप्त होने की मान्यता है।

इस वीडियो में प्रस्तुत है पद्मिनी / कमला एकादशी अमृतवाणी, जिसमें श्री हरि विष्णु महिमा, एकादशी व्रत का महत्व, धर्म, भक्ति और मोक्ष का सुंदर वर्णन किया गया है।

🙏 पद्मिनी / कमला एकादशी अमृतवाणी सुनने के लाभ:

• भगवान विष्णु की विशेष कृपा प्राप्ति
• पापों से मुक्ति और पुण्य फल की प्राप्ति
• मानसिक शांति और सकारात्मक ऊर्जा
• जीवन में सुख, समृद्धि और सौभाग्य की वृद्धि
• धर्म, भक्ति और आध्यात्मिक उन्नति
• नकारात्मकता और बाधाओं में कमी

पद्मिनी और कमला एकादशी के दिन व्रत, दान, विष्णु पूजन, तुलसी पूजा, मंत्र जाप और अमृतवाणी श्रवण अत्यंत शुभ माना जाता है।

🔔 ऐसे ही एकादशी अमृतवाणी, कथा, भजन और आरती सुनने के लिए चैनल को Subscribe करें और Bell Icon दबाना न भूलें।

#VishnuBhakti #HariNarayan #Bhakti #Devotional #AdhikMaas

snippet.title: Power Star Pawan Singh: Devra Nihare (Song) | Neelam Giri | Superhit Bhojpuri Song 2026
snippet.description:
तैयार हो जाईं दिल के धड़कन बढ़ावे वाला सुपरहिट धमाका खातिर!
Power Star Pawan Singh के दमदार आवाज अउर Neelam Giri के कातिल अदायगी से सजल “Devra Nihare” अब रउआ सबके दिल पर राज करे आ गइल बा।

snippet.title: शिवानी का सबसे धमाकेदार डांस 💥 | Tere Chakkar Mein Sajan | Shivani Rasiya | Dj Lokgeet 2026
snippet.description:
शिवानी का सबसे धमाकेदार डांस 💥 | Tere Chakkar Mein Sajan | Shivani Rasiya | Dj Lokgeet 2026
शिवानी का सबसे धमाकेदार डांस 💥 | Tere Chakkar Mein Sajan | Shivani Rasiya | Dj Lokgeet 2026
शिवानी का सबसे धमाकेदार डांस 💥 | Tere Chakkar Mein Sajan | Shivani Rasiya | Dj Lokgeet 2026

"स्वागत है आप सभी का Rathore Cassettes पर! 💥

इस वीडियो में देखें मशहूर कलाकार शिवानी रसिया का अब तक का सबसे धमाकेदार डांस 'तेरे चक्कर में साजन' गाने पर। अगर आपको देहाती लोकगीत और धमाकेदार डांस पसंद है, तो यह वीडियो खास आपके लिए है!

वीडियो को लाइक करें, शेयर करें और हमारे चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें ताकि आप शिवानी के नए डांस वीडियो सबसे पहले देख सकें!


🎵 Song Details: 
🔹 Song: Tere Chakkar Mein Sajan
🔹 Singer: Shivani
🔹 Writer: Lokesh Prajapati
🔹 Music: Sonotek GRP Bros (Surya Panchal)

pt-BR.title: Kore Kore Sapne Mere - Visualizador de Letras | 26 Anos de Sooryavansham | Amitabh Bachchan K. S....
pt-BR.description:
Celebrando 26 anos incríveis de Sooryavansham — um filme que continua vivo no coração de milhões. Das performances inesquecíveis de Amitabh Bachchan ao drama familiar emocionante, passando pelos diálogos marcantes e pela música atemporal, este clássico permanece um dos filmes mais amados do cinema indiano.

Obrigado pelo carinho e pelas lembranças ao longo dos anos. Um brinde ao legado, às emoções e à magia eterna de Sooryavansham. ❤️

#Sooryavansham #26AnosDeSooryavansham #AmitabhBachchan #ClássicosDeBollywood #FilmeAtemporal #CinemaIndiano #Nostalgia #ClássicoDeBollywood

Letra em inglês

What are my dreams?
Barson se the kitne adhoore
Dheere dheere ki saha hai
Toon kar diye unko poor.

♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫

Eu prometo, eu prometo.

Eu te quero.

Mais do que a minha própria vida.

Eu prometo, eu prometo.

Meus sonhos estão vazios.

Quantos eu amei por anos.

Lentamente, eu os decorei com cores.

Eu os pintei completamente.

♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫

Eu prometo, eu prometo.

Eu te quero.

Mais do que a minha própria vida.

Eu prometo, eu prometo.

Meus sonhos estão vazios.

Quantos eu amei por anos.

♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫

Enviado por: @JEKY_KAYAKUE ♈Indonésia☺♈
♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫

Traremos as estrelas para casa~...
profundamente apaixonados~. Iluminaremos tudo~

Elas chegaram, a primavera chegou...
Elas trouxeram visões de felicidade...

Meus sonhos foram tantos, ... ♈Indonésia☺♈
♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫

Eu nunca chorei nem cinco vezes.

Lágrimas sobre pedra, isso não acontece.

Preciso de água, preciso perder alguém.

O que tiver que acontecer aqui, acontecerá.

Meus sonhos são tão amargos.

Tantos sonhos que tive desde as chuvas,

Lentamente, com as cores que decorei,

Transformei-os em tons.

♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫

Eu prometo, eu prometo.

Eu te quero mais do que a minha vida.

Eu prometo, eu prometo.

Kore Meus sonhos são muitos
Quantos adoram as chuvas
Lentamente, as cores se espalham

As músicas foram completadas

id.title: Kore Kore Sapne Mere -Visualisator Lirik | 26 Tahun Sooryavansham | Amitabh Bachchan K. S. Sowmya
id.description:
Merayakan 26 tahun yang luar biasa dari Sooryavansham — sebuah film yang terus hidup di hati jutaan orang. Dari penampilan Amitabh Bachchan yang tak terlupakan hingga drama keluarga yang emosional, dialog yang kuat, dan musik yang abadi, film klasik ini tetap menjadi salah satu film India yang paling dicintai.

Terima kasih atas cinta dan kenangan selama bertahun-tahun. Mari kita rayakan warisan, emosi, dan keajaiban abadi Sooryavansham. ❤️

#Sooryavansham #26YearsOfSooryavansham #AmitabhBachchan #BollywoodClassics #EvergreenMovie #IndianCinema #Nostalgia #ClassicBollywood

Lirik dalam Bahasa Inggris

Apa mimpiku?
Berapa lama aku bermimpi?
Berhari-hari berlalu
Berhari-hari berlalu
Berhentilah sejenak.

Berhentilah sejenak.

Berhentilah sejenak.

♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫

Aku berjanji, aku berjanji.

Aku menginginkanmu.

Lebih dari hidupku.

Aku berjanji, aku berjanji.

Mimpi-mimpiku hampa.
Betapa banyak yang telah kucintai selama bertahun-tahun.

Perlahan, aku menghiasinya dengan warna-warna.

Aku telah melukisnya sepenuhnya.

♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫

Aku berjanji, aku berjanji.

Aku menginginkanmu.
Lebih dari hidupku.

Aku berjanji, aku berjanji.

Mimpi-mimpiku hampa.
Betapa banyak yang telah kucintai selama bertahun-tahun.

♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫

Diunggah Oleh: @JEKY_KAYAKUE ♈Indonesia☺♈
♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫

Kita akan membawa pulang bintang-bintang~...
dalam cinta~. Kita akan meneranginya~

Mereka telah datang, musim semi telah tiba...
Mereka telah membawa visi kebahagiaan...

Mimpiku begitu banyak, ... ♈Indonesia☺♈
♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫

Aku tidak pernah menangis bahkan lima kali.

Air mata di atas batu, itu tidak akan terjadi.

Aku harus mengambil air, aku harus kehilangan seseorang.

Apa pun yang harus terjadi di sini, harus terjadi.

Mimpi-mimpiku begitu pahit.

Begitu banyak mimpi yang kumiliki sejak hujan,

Perlahan, dengan warna-warna yang telah kuhias,

Aku telah mengubahnya menjadi nada.

♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫♫

Aku berjanji, aku berjanji.

Aku menginginkanmu lebih dari hidupku.

Aku berjanji, aku berjanji.

Kore Mimpiku banyak
Betapa banyak yang memuja hujan
Perlahan-lahan warna-warna menghiasi

Nada-nada telah disempurnakan

snippet.title: Kattalan - Blood On Tusk | Cubes | Ravi Basrur | Pepe | Shareef Muhammed |Dushara | Sunil | Kabir
snippet.description:
🔥 Enter the fierce world of “Kattalan - Blood On Tusk” ⚔️🎶

Packed with raw energy, intense visuals, and electrifying music by Ravi Basrur, this powerful track from Kattalan delivers an epic cinematic experience.

Featuring Pepe, Dushara, Sunil, and Kabir, the song captures the wild spirit, action-packed atmosphere, and emotional intensity of the film.

🎬 Movie: Kattalan
⭐ Featuring: Pepe, Dushara, Sunil, Kabir
🎶 Music: Ravi Basrur
🎥 Presented By: Cubes
🎬 Creator: Shareef Muhammed

Feel the rage, rhythm, and cinematic power of Blood On Tusk!

#Kattalan #BloodOnTusk #RaviBasrur #Pepe #Dushara #Sunil #Kabir #MalayalamSongs #Trending #MassAnthem

snippet.title: GTA 5 | Franklin & Shinchan🥛President Loves Shinchan Milk! | Biggest Milk Contract
snippet.description:
Shinchan and Franklin are successfully selling Shinchan Milk in Los Santos! 🐄🥛
People love the milk because of its amazing quality and fresh taste! 😍
One day, the President’s security officers arrive with a special request — they need a full tanker of milk! 😱🚛
With Trevor’s help, Franklin and Shinchan prepare a huge milk tanker and go to meet the President. But there’s a problem... security guards stop them from entering! 🚫
Shinchan gets a crazy idea 💡
They change the tanker into a military-style vehicle and try again! 😎🔥
Will the President like Shinchan Milk?
Watch till the end to see what happens when Shinchan Milk becomes famous across Los Santos! 🚛🥛
🎮 GTA 5 Malayalam Story Video by GTA Mallu
💬 Created by Siva Ganesh
✨ Funny, exciting, and family-friendly GTA 5 story!

snippet.title: पुरुषोत्तम मास विशेष - आज इस चमत्कारी " पद्मिनी एकादशी कथा " को सुनने से सभी मनोकामनाएं पूर्ण होतीहै
snippet.description:
Padmini Ekadashi :  
साल में कुल 24 एकादशियां होती हैं, लेकिन अधिक मास में एकादशियों की संख्या बढ़ जाती हैं. इस बार अधिक मास होने के कारण कुल 26 एकादशी होंगी. अधिक मास के शुक्ल पक्ष की एकादशी को पद्मिनी एकादशी कहा जाता है.  पदमिनी एकादशी का व्रत करने व इस एकादशी कथा को सुनने से सभी मनोकामनाएं पूर्ण हो जाती हैं

snippet.title: Zaroori Tha (Music Video) Rahat Fateh Ali Khan | Gauahar Khan and Kushal Tandon | Back 2 Love
snippet.description:
Aaj hum lekar aaye hain ustad Rahat Fateh Ali Khan ka one of the most iconic and heartbreaking tracks "Zaroori Tha". Agar aapne kabhi sachha pyaar kiya hai aur us dard ko mehsoos kiya hai, toh yeh gaana seedha aapke dil ko chhoo jayega. 🥺💔

Featuring the amazing Gauahar Khan and Kushal Tandon, yeh video ek aisi adhuri love story bayaan karta hai jo aapko emotional kar degi. Rahat Sahab ki magical voice aur deep lyrics ka yeh combo sahi mein next level hai!

Aapko is gaane ka kaunsa part sabse best laga? Hamein Comments mein zaroor batayein! 👇

Credits:
Performed by Rahat Fateh Ali Khan
Written by Khalil ur Rehman, Sahir Ali Bagga
Produced by Rahat Fateh Ali KhanSalman Ahmed

(C) 2014 Universal Music India Pvt. Ltd.

en-US.description:
Today, we bring you one of the most iconic and heartbreaking tracks from maestro Rahat Fateh Ali Khan, "Zaroori Tha." If you've ever experienced true love and felt the pain, this song will touch your heart. 🥺💔

Featuring the amazing Gauahar Khan and Kushal Tandon, this video narrates an incomplete love story that will leave you emotional. The combination of Rahat Sahab's magical voice and deep lyrics is truly next-level!

Which part of this song did you like best? Let us know in the comments! 👇

snippet.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe Official Video Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026
snippet.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

আশা করি ভিডিওটি আপনাদের ভালো লাগবে এবং আপনারা এটি উপভোগ করবেন :)
______________________
💙 আজকের ভিডিওটির অনুপ্রেরণার জন্য এই অসাধারণ নির্মাতাদের জানাই অশেষ ধন্যবাদ ও কৃতজ্ঞতা:

১৯৭৬ সালের কপিরাইট আইনের ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি, শিক্ষা এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে "ন্যায্য ব্যবহার"-এর অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে।

ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত একটি ব্যবহার যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে।

snippet.description:
Kue Upar - Aman Jaji | Komal Chaudhary | Lalit Hooda | Bharti Chaudhary | New Haryanvi Song 2026
AMAN JAJI PRESENTS LATEST NEW HARYANVI SONG 2026 🎵 “KUE UPAR” A BRAND NEW HARYANVI DJ SONG 2026
Get ready to enjoy the latest Haryanvi track “Kue Upar” in the powerful voice of Sunil Sikander and Komal Chaudhary. This song is written by Lalit Hooda, music by Gulshan Music, and beautifully performed by Lalit Hooda, Ak Changia, Bharti Chaudhary and Ekta

“Kue Upar” is a full Haryanvi flavour song with desi vibe, catchy music, energetic performance and a proper village-style Haryanvi feel. Watch, share and support this latest Haryanvi song on Aman Jaji YouTube Channel.

snippet.title: घर में चलाओ ये सुंदरकांड पाठ 🏡 सारी परेशानियां दूर होंगी | Full Path -Sampurn Sunderkand
snippet.description:
घर में चलाओ ये सुंदरकांड पाठ 🏡 सारी परेशानियां दूर होंगी | Full Path -Sampurn Sunderkand

Album :- Sampurn Sunderkand
Song :-  Sampurn Sunderkand
Singer :- Ravi Raj 
Lyrics :- Dinesh Railhan 
Music :- Railhan Studios 
Recording - Kailash Ji 
Makeup - Shivu Makeovers 
Director - Vivek Singh
Digital Partner : Lokdhun 
Label / Company :- Bhakti Dhaam 
VG - 44632

Spotify -  https://open.spotify.com/album/1rAHzMZye5CFjUII4NKB5l
Instagram -    https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/1218369780381010/
Gaana - https://gaana.com/song/sampurn-sunderkand-2688-7175
Jio Saavan - https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/sampurn-sunderkand/Oz4-SytYVn0
Apple - https://music.apple.com/in/album/sampurn-sunderkand/1876480389?i=1876480391
Amazon -  https://music.apple.com/in/album/sampurn-sunderkand/1876480389?i=1876480391
YT Music -  https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=meKYP8Q6aAY 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

सुन्दरकांड” – श्री राम चरित मानस का 5 वा अध्याय/कांड है। सुन्दर कांड (Sundar Kand) को सबसे पहले रामायण में श्री वाल्मीकि जी ने संस्कृत में लिखा था। बाद में तुलसी दस जी ने जब श्री राम चरित मानस लिखी, तो सुन्दर कांड का अवधी भाषा वाला रूप हम सब के सामने आया 
सुन्दरकाण्ड में हनुमान जी का सीता माता को खोजने के लिए की गयी लंका यात्रा का सम्पूर्ण मनमोहक बखान किया गया है।
सुन्दरकांड एक ऐसा भाग है जो सिर्फ हनुमान जी की वीरता का बखान करता है । सुन्दर कांड हनुमान जी पर केंद्रित सबसे पुरानी रचना है। ऐसा माना जाता है के सुन्दरकाण्ड के पाठ से सभी मनोकामनाएं पूर्ण होती हैं ।

सुन्दर कांड के फायदे | Benefits of - Sunder Kand
 यह कहा जाता है कि चालीस सप्ताह तक लगातार जो कोई श्रद्धापूर्वक Sundarkand का पाठ करता है, तो उसके सभी मनोरथ पूरे होते हैं तथा जीवन के सभी कष्ट, दुःख, परेशानियाँ दूर हो जाती हैँ । कई ज्योतिषी भी विपरित परिस्थितियों में सुंदरकांड करने की ही सलाह देते हैं। यदि किसी व्यक्ति के जीवन में अत्यधिक परेशानियां हो तथा कोई काम नहीं बन पा रहा है, आत्मविश्वास की कमी हो तो सुंदरकांड के पाठ से शुभ फल प्राप्त होता है।

Sunderkand, Sunderkand chaupai, sunderkand path, sunderkand full, sunderkand in hindi, सम्पूर्ण सुन्दरकाण्ड पाठ, Sampurn SunderKand, sunder kand, sunderkand ka path, sangeetmay sunderkand, sunderkand ramayan, Sunderkand fast, Sunderkand with lyrics, Sunder kand By Prem Parkash Dubey, Sunderkand live, Mangalwar Special, Kam samay main sunderkand, 45 min mein sunderkand, sunderkand in hindi, हनुमान जी का सुंदरकांड, रामायण का सुंदरकांड, संपूर्ण सुंदरकांड चौपाई, सुंदरकांड हिंदी में,सुंदरकांड डाउनलोड, Mangalwar special sunderkand, Tuesday special sunderkand, Tuesday speical, Sunderkand ka path kese karein, अब तक का सबसे कम समय मे गाया गया सम्पूर्ण सुन्दरकाण्ड पाठ, Sunderkand ki chaupaiya, sunderkand sunne ke labh,

snippet.title: Padmini Ekadasi Brata Katha | ମଳମାସ ପଦ୍ମିନୀ ଏକାଦଶୀର ପରମ ପୂଣ୍ୟଦାୟକ ଗାହାଣୀ | Debasmita Acharya
snippet.description:
କଣ୍ଠଶିଳ୍ପୀ ଦେବସ୍ମିତା ଆଚାର୍ଯ୍ୟଙ୍କ ଅତି ଅମୃତମୟ ଆଉ ଆବେଗଭରା କଣ୍ଠରେ ପ୍ରସ୍ତୁତ ଏହି ବିଶେଷ ଆଧ୍ୟାତ୍ମିକ ଅର୍ଘ୍ୟ — "ପଦ୍ମିନୀ ଏକାଦଶୀ ବ୍ରତ କଥା ଓ କାହାଣୀ (ଗାହାଣୀ ପୁରୁଷୋତ୍ତମ ଏକାଦଶୀ)"। ମଳମାସରେ ଆସୁଥିବା ଏହି ସ୍ୱତନ୍ତ୍ର ଏକାଦଶୀର ମହିମା ସ୍ଵୟଂ ଭଗବାନ ଶ୍ରୀକୃଷ୍ଣ ମହାରାଜ ଯୁଧିଷ୍ଠିରଙ୍କୁ ବୁଝାଇଥିଲେ। କେମିତି ମାତା ପଦ୍ମିନୀ ଏହି ବ୍ରତ କରି ଅସାଧ୍ୟ ସାଧନ କରିଥିଲେ ଏବଂ ପରମ ପରାକ୍ରମୀ ସନ୍ତାନ ଲାଭ କରିଥିଲେ, ତାହାର ପବିତ୍ର ରହସ୍ୟ ଏହି ଗାହାଣୀରେ ବର୍ଣ୍ଣିତ।

ଦେବସ୍ମିତାଙ୍କ କାରୁଣ୍ୟଭରା ଗାୟନ ଶୈଳୀରେ ଏହି ପବିତ୍ର ବ୍ରତର କାହାଣୀ ଆପଣଙ୍କ ହୃଦୟକୁ ଭକ୍ତି ରସରେ ବିଭୋର କରିଦେବ। ଏହି ଗାହାଣୀ ଶ୍ରବଣ କଲେ ଘରୁ ସବୁ ଦୁଃଖ-କଷ୍ଟ ଦୂର ହୁଏ ଏବଂ ପ୍ରଭୁ ଜଗନ୍ନାଥ ଓ ମାଆ ମହାଲକ୍ଷ୍ମୀଙ୍କ ଅପୂର୍ବ ଆଶୀର୍ବାଦ ମିଳିଥାଏ। ଆସନ୍ତୁ, ଏହି ମହାପୂଣ୍ୟର ଅମୃତ ବେଳାରେ ନିଜ ପ୍ରାଣକୁ ହରିମୟ କରିବା ଏବଂ ଏହି ଦିବ୍ୟ ଗାହାଣୀକୁ ଶ୍ରବଣ କରିବା

#PadminiEkadashi #PurushottamMasa #DebasmitaAcharya #OdiaEkadashiKatha #MalamasaGahani #OdiaBhajan #JayJagannath #EkadashiVratKatha #SidharthUtsav #OdiaDevotionalSongs #SpiritualOdisha #EkadashiGahani #BhaktiSangeet #OdishaCulture #LordVishnu

snippet.title: Ammaputhappe | Athiradi | Tovino Thomas | Basil Joseph | Vineeth Sreenivasan | Vishnu Vijay
snippet.description:
For more latest songs & videos, subscribe 👉 https://bit.ly/Saregama_Malayalam

Presenting the lyrical "Ammaputhappe" from 'Athiradi' starring Tovino Thomas, Basil Joseph, Zarin Shihab, Riya Shibu and others. Directed by Arun Anirudhan. Music Composed by Vishnu Vijay

Song Credits: 
Amma Puthappe
Singers  : Vineeth Sreenivasan, Vishnu Vijay
Lyrics : Suhail Koya
Flute Performed By Vishnu Vijay
Music Composed, Arranged And Produced By Vishnu Vijay @ Dravida Studios, Chennai

Live Group Vocal Recording Credits : 
Students Of Sri Swathi Thirunnal College Of Music, Thiruvananthapuram

Chorus Singers :
Adithya K N, Abhinanda J, Ardhra Anil, Gayathri Gopan, Anushika C, Sandra Suresh, Thushara, Vaishnavi, Gopika M G, Anaswara A R, Devipriya Pradeep, Deva Priya S, Amritha R, Adheena Mohan, Shanmuga Priya, Ancy Godfrey Pereira, Diya B Warrier, Devananda S, Ekathara, Anora Johnson, Lekshmi Js, Nandana S, Ashfiya Anvar, Maya Vinod, Gouthami S Nair, Gouri Mahadevan, Arundathy R, Meenakshi Iv, Preethi R, Daya P Deepu, Nandana Gs, Meenakshi Sreejith, Nivedya, Karishma, Pradhicsha D, Hema Bharathy M, Harshamohan, Sanjana Viswanath, Geethu Renjith, Bhagyaraj Ss, Nizfan, Vishal Binoy, Stephin Tom Antony, Sarang Ks, Aswin Rajesh, Akhilji Rs, Shine Thomas, Madhav Santhosh, Ananthu As, Abhishek B Raj, Aravind M Nair, Krishnadev Jj, Amalraj, Nihal P, Abhiram T S

Music Conductors : Vishnu Vijay, Renjith Surendran, K S Harisankar
Live Recording Engineers : Sujith Sreedhar, Amal Mithu
Session Coordinators : Vignesh Raj, Paul Renold, Ramesh Vasudev, Christy Thomas Cherian.
Artist Liaison & Distribution Manager : Poornima Kannan
Music Production Manager : Christy Thomas Cherian
Studio Sessions Manager : Paul Renold
Artist Session Manager : K D Vincent
Mixing & Mastering : Sujith Sreedhar@The Masterhouse,2bq Studios,Chennai. 
Assisted By Amal Mithu
Sessions Manager: Vignesh Raj

Studios: Vineeth Sreenivasan’s Vocal Recorded @ Dravida Studios, Chennai
            

Movie Credits: 
Directed By: Arun Anirudhan
Produced By: Dr. Ananthu S  &  Basil Joseph
Co-Producers: Sameer Thahir, Tovino Thomas
Written By: Paulson Skaria, Arun Anirudhan
Dop: Samuel Henry
Editor: Chaman Chakko
Music Composer : Vishnu Vijay
Lyrics: Suhail Koya
Production Designer: Maanav Suresh
Costume Designer: Mashar Hamsa
Make Up: Ronex Xavier
Stunts: Action Sandhosh & Phoenix Prabu
Sound Designer: Nixon George
Production Controller: Antony Thomas
Art Director: Akhil Damodhar
Executive Producers: Nikhil Ramanath & Amal Xavier Manackatharayil
Sound Mix: Rajakrishnan Mr
Di Colorist: Joyner Thomas
Additional Dialogues: Sonu Surendran
Finance Controller: Midhun K Varghese
Vfx: Mindstein Studios
Chief Associate Directors: Suku Damodar, Sohil
Stills: Rohith K Suresh
Title Design: Sarcasanam
Pro: Vaisakh C Vadakkeveedu & Jinu Anilkumar
Publicity Designs: Yellowtooths
Digital Content: Dripwave Collective

Lyrics: 
Ammaputhappe 
Moodaanini raavaayiramunde (2)

Viralathil thirummi njaan
Vazhuthi veezhum madi mele

Cheruthanal kuliru nee
Chuduveyil kanalu njaan 

Cheruthanal kuliru nee
Chuduveyil Kanalu Njaan (with chorus)

(Chorus)

Pinnaale aaro undaayirunne
Oonjaalu kaalam muthal
Athu neeyaayirunne
Neraayirunne
Nooraalinoraalu Nee.. 

Kurunnu Naavo Pozhi Paranje
Athine neeyo sheri paranje 
Chiri novukal samaasamam
Nirayum Mizhiyaake (chorus)

Ammaputhappe 
Moodaanini raavaayiramunde
Viralathil thirummi njaan
Vazhuthi veezhum madi mele

Cheruthanal kuliru nee
Chuduveyil Kanalu Njaan (chorus)

Cheruthanal kuliru nee
Chuduveyil Kanalu Njaan - 2 (with chorus)

Chiri Novukal Samaasamam
Sukhamaadhikal Samaasamam
Cheruthanal kuliru nee
Chuduveyil Kanalu Njaan - 2 (with chorus)


Label: Saregama India Limited, A RPSG Group Company

snippet.title: Franklin Opens Most HAUNTED Mystery Containers In Indian Bike Driving 3D! 😱
snippet.description:
#NessFitGamer #gta 5 #gta5hindi #gta5mods 

Franklin Opens Most HAUNTED Mystery Containers In Indian Bike Driving 3D! 😱

This video is about the Indian Bike Driving 3D game, this is a horror scary story about Mystery Container or Mystery Box In Indian Bike Driving 3D. In this scary story, Franklin meets many ghosts and monsters like Granny, Kamla, Choo Choo Charles, Ice Scream Rod, and Huggy Wuggy. To unlock his own mystery container in Indian Bike Driving 3D, Franklin must invite all these ghosts. Will Franklin survive this horror adventure? What is inside the mystery box of franklin of Indian Bike Driving 3D? Watch the full scary story to find out!

Instagram
https://www.instagram.com/nessfitgamer01?igsh=MTBudmpzZGdnZXljNg==

I hope you guys enjoyed this video if you did please consider to like the video and subscribe the channel. ❤️

Some 3D assets and mods are sourced from community modders and are used for fan-made cinematic purposes.
No ownership is claimed over any third-party assets.

Disclaimer:
This video is made using GTA 5, with Indian Bike Driving 3D assets added inside the game.

This is NOT actual gameplay of Indian Bike Driving 3D. Everything shown is custom-made using GTA mods. All characters and events shown in this video are fictional and created for entertainment purpose.

snippet.title: O Firki Wali Tu Kal fir aja | 90's Bollywood Style Romantic Song | Hindi Love Song 2026
snippet.description:
#HindiSong #RomanticSong #SadSong
O Firki Wali Tu Kal Aaja ❤️ | 90's Bollywood Style Romantic Song | Hindi Love Song 2026

O Firki Wali ek heart touching Hindi romantic song hai jo 90's Bollywood ke retro vibes aur emotional love story ko capture karta hai. Yeh gaana un sab ke liye hai jo sachche pyaar, yaadein aur judai ko mehsoos karte hain.

Isme aapko milega:
• Retro Bollywood feel 🎞️
• Emotional aur soulful lyrics 💔
• Soft melody jo dil ko chhoo jaaye 🎶
• Old is gold style romantic vibe ✨

snippet.description:
🔥 THIS GTA 5 TRAIN EXPERIMENT BROKE THE GAME! 🚂💥

Today we created the MOST INSANE GTA 5 chaos experiment EVER…
A FULL SPEED TRAIN vs 100 EXPENSIVE SUPERCARS including Lamborghinis, Bugattis, Ferraris, McLarens & more! 😱🔥

The results were PURE CHAOS… cars flying everywhere, HUGE explosions, crazy ragdolls and an ending NOBODY expected! 🤯

snippet.title: #Video | छोकरी पटावतार | #Shilpi Raj | Chokari Patawtar | New Bhojpuri Gana 2026
snippet.description:
#Video | छोकरी पटावतार | #Shilpi Raj | Chokari Patawtar | New Bhojpuri Gana 2026
#Video | छोकरी पटावतार | #Shilpi Raj | Chokari Patawtar | New Bhojpuri Gana 2026


♪ Audio Credits 
►Album -छोकरी पटावतार
►Song - Chokari Patawtar
►Singer - Shilpi Raj
►Lyrics - Prince Priyedarshi
►Music Director - Priyanshu Singh

📽️ Video Credits 
► Video - Paradise Production 
► Feat - Srishti Utrakhandi, Universal Nitin 
► Director - Lucky Vishwakarma 
► Dop - Rajan Verma 
► Editor - Sandeep Yadav 
► Di - Rohit Singh
► Co- Ordinator - Suraj Singh
►Producer - Guddu Kumar Singh
►Digital Partner - Global Music Junction Pvt. Ltd.
►Company/ Label - Meera Music


मुखड़ा
अपना मेहर से तू त, कुछ त छुपावातारा 
रुपया उड़ावातारा, नया छोकरी पटावातारा
ख़ाली हमके सतावातारा, नया छोकरी पटावातारा

अंतरा
तहरो जवानी चढ़ल हमरो जवानी 
तब काहे बहरा काटेला जाके चानी 
( हम कहाँ फ़ानी )
रोज़ नया नया करेला तलाश राजाजी 
हम सूत जाईब खाके सल्फ़ाश राजाजी 

घरवा में छोड़ी कनिया, नचनिया नचावातारा 
रुपया उड़ावातारा, नया छोकरी पटावातारा
ख़ाली हमके सतावातारा, नया छोकरी पटावातारा

अंतरा
प्रिंस प्रियांशु के लागल बा दुआ
तबे मरद तू भेटईला लफूआ 
( साफ़ लफुआ हो गईला … ए हो )
आजे पता हमरा चलल बा डीपीया से 
तोहर चलाता चक्कर शिलीपिया से 

ले ले तू बाड़ऽ टेंडर, ब्लेंडर पियावातारा 
ह त रुपया उड़ावातारा, नया छोकरी पटावातारा
ख़ाली हमके सतावातारा, नया छोकरी पटावातारा

snippet.title: पद्मिनी एकादशी की आरती 2026 - Padmini Ekadashi Vrat Aarti | Ekadashi Mata ki Aarti ॐ जय एकादशी माता
snippet.description:
🙏🌸 एकादशी माता जी की आरती | पद्मिनी एकादशी स्पेशल आरती 2026 🌸🙏

इस पावन पद्मिनी एकादशी के शुभ अवसर पर सुनिए श्रद्धा और भक्ति से भरपूर “ॐ जय एकादशी माता” आरती।
भगवान विष्णु और एकादशी माता की कृपा प्राप्त करने के लिए यह दिव्य आरती मन को शांति, सुख और सकारात्मक ऊर्जा से भर देती है। ✨🕉️

🌼 इस वीडियो में शामिल:
🔸 एकादशी माता जी की आरती
🔸 पद्मिनी एकादशी व्रत आरती
🔸 सुपरफास्ट श्री एकादशी आरती
🔸 हिंदी लिरिक्स सहित आरती
🔸 विष्णु भक्ति एवं एकादशी स्पेशल भजन

🙏 मान्यता है कि एकादशी के दिन श्रद्धा से व्रत और आरती करने से जीवन के दुख दूर होते हैं तथा भगवान विष्णु की विशेष कृपा प्राप्त होती है।
इस मधुर आरती को सुनकर अपने घर में भक्तिमय वातावरण बनाइए और श्री हरि का आशीर्वाद पाइए। 💛

✨ अगर आपको यह आरती पसंद आए तो वीडियो को
👍 Like करें
💬 Comment करें
🔔 Subscribe जरूर करें

snippet.description:
GTA 5: Franklin & Shinchan Discover A Giant Monster Cursed Bike! 👹🏍️ | GTA 5 Bangla Gameplay
#tsunami #shinchan #shinchangta5

In this GTA 5 Bangla episode, Franklin and Shinchan discover a giant monster cursed bike hidden inside Los Santos! This mysterious bike is not normal — it brings chaos, danger, and terrifying surprises wherever it goes.

👹 Cursed Monster Bike | GTA 5 Bangla Story | Mystery & Horror | Action Mod

Featuring full Bangla voiceover and cinematic editing, this episode delivers suspense, scary moments, and intense action with a dangerous cursed bike.

💬 Would you ride this cursed monster bike or run away?

snippet.title: Nagan Si Lugai Tera Balam Chota (Official Video) Farmani Naaz | New haryanvi Song | Hema| Naaz Music
snippet.description:
#NaganSiLugai #farmaninaaz i #terabalamchota #Naazmusic 

Song  - Nagan Si Lugai | नागन सी लुगाई 
Artist   -  Hema Chaudhary.Rahul Mulheda , Varunesh Baisla
Lyrics  - varunesh baisla , Anuj Mulheda 
Music - Gaurav Panchal (Gr Music -8708626865)
Singer - Farmani Naaz , Manish Tyagi 
Video Shoot - Panchal Productions
Director -  Rahul Mulheda , Nitin Panchal 
Editor - Nitin Panchal 
Publicity Design - Rahul mulheda
Publisher - Naaz Music
Label -   Naaz Music
Production - Rahul Mulheda
Special Thanks - Naaz Music And Team
For any query:- Email - farmaninaaz786@gmail.com

                 Lyrics
Mhare khat khatoli ka na tota
ra mahre khat khatoli ka na tota

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Lakh lakh ke shut ma phru
Sava lakh ki jutti re

Chandi ka mera vir al nada
Delhi ke ma kotti re

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Up ke ma dunga maru halle delhi sari ri
Dur dur ta nigah gadave rande cheel juhari ri

Love you bhabhi

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

do balka ki ma bngi ma lagu kati kavari si 
Dhunge mere jholl marre

Chotti nag bnari ri
Bin hi bja du kya

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri


म्हारे खाट खटोली का ना टोटा
र म्हारे खाट खटोली का ना टोटा 

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

लाख लाख के सूट मै पहरू सवा लाख की जूती रे
चांदी का मेरा वायरल नाड़ा दिल्ली के मै कोठी र

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

यूपी के मै ढुंगा मारू हाले दिल्ली सारी री
दूर दूर त निगाह गड़ावे रांडे छेल जुहारी री
लव यू भाभी

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

दो बालका की मां बनगी मै लागू कती कवारी सी
ढुंगे मेरे झोल मार र चोटी नाग बनारी री
बीन ही बजा दू क्या

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री

snippet.title: Mujhe Tune Malik(Live Performance) | Swati Mishra | Bhakti Song 2026
snippet.description:
🙏 Mujhe Tune Malik is a heart-touching Hindi devotional song dedicated to thanking God for every blessing, happiness, success, and support in life. This soulful bhajan expresses gratitude to the Almighty for always guiding us through difficult times and filling life with love and positivity.

If you believe that God’s blessings can change life completely, this devotional song is for you. ❤️

✨ Listen, feel, and connect with divine positivity through this beautiful bhakti geet.

🔔 Subscribe for more:

Hindi Bhajans
Devotional Songs
Spiritual Music
Ram Bhajan

Krishna Bhajan
Motivational Bhakti Songs

🙏 Thank you for your love and support.
🙏 Jai Shri Ram
🙏 Har Har Mahadev

snippet.title: Kulfi Walu ( कुल्फी वालू )Adivasi New Song 2026 | Gulatya Song | Adivasi Comedy Song| Cd Group Music
snippet.description:
Kulfi Walu ( कुल्फी वालू )Adivasi New Song 2026 | Gulatya Song | Adivasi Comedy Song| Cd Group Music
________________________________________________
कुल्फीवालू” सिर्फ एक गाना नहीं, प्यार ❤️, दोस्ती 🤝, कॉमेडी 😄 और इमोशन्स 🥺 का पूरा मजेदार सफर है।
इस गाने में मस्ती के साथ एक अच्छा मैसेज भी छुपा है — दारू जिंदगी और रिश्तों दोनों को खराब कर सकती है।
पूरा वीडियो देखें और बताएं आपको सबसे ज्यादा कौन सा सीन पसंद 
आया। 🔥🎬
________________________________________________

➤ Presents by: C D Group Music
➤ Story Song Title: Kulfi Walu 
➤ Video Director: Mayur Singh Chauhan 
Assistant director : ramasingh bamne
➤ Action Director: Mayur Singh Chauhan
Assistant Action director : ramasingh bamne
➤ Choreographer: Mayur Singh Chauhan
➤ Featuring: Vicky Barela, Vinzza Barde , Akky Babole ,Amar patel , Sk Sarkar , Mukesh Senani , Sawan Arya,Ram Senani, Saksham Chouhan , Abhishek Solanki, Pradeep bardey
➤ Singers: Ajay Mujalde, Heena Dawar 
➤ Lyrics: Ajay Mujalde 
➤ Music composer : Ritesh Kirade 
➤ Music Mix Mastering: Ritesh Kirade
➤ Recording Studio: Shanti Recording Studio Jogwada
➤ Rhythm: Ritesh Kirade
➤ DOP: Pradeep Bardey 
➤ DOP Assistant: Team Sakshamm Chouhan 
➤ Camera : Dhanilaal Kirade
➤ Video Editing Rohit Vaishanki ( Aadiwood )
➤ Make-up Artist: 
➤ Costume Designer: 
➤ Digital Partner: Agesh Solanki (Adivasi Media)
➤ Channel Manager: Agesh Solanki
➤ Music Label: C D Group Music
➤ Group Members (Female): Jyoti Bhargo , Punam kirade ,
➤ Group Members (Male): Yuvi - Kuldeep
➤ Management Team: Ramasing Bamane, Bamane, Arjun Singh Solanki,Ram Senani, Aadiwood Family & AVP Family
➤ Special Thanks: (Aadiwood Family), (AVP Family), (C D Group Family),Rohit Vaishaki, Arjoon Singh Solanki ,Agesh Solanki, Mukesh Pawara, Ramasing Bamane, Aashu Bamane, Mayur Singh Chouhan, Karan Soalnki, Koushal Senani,
➤ Based on: This song is a tribute to the everyday lives, hard work, and deep-rooted traditions of India’s tribal communities
_____________________
